commands.repair_reason: Needs contributor changes and real patched-branch proof; the current blocker is a command-execution policy/security issue rather than a safe automated repair lane.; Needs attention: The diff can downgrade Codex command approval policy based on the wrong config file, which can bypass intended command approvals.; Review finding: [P1] Resolve hooks state from the spawned Codex home — extensions/codex/src/app-server/con... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Codex app-server approval-policy downgrading when user Codex `features.hooks` is disabled, prevents re-promotion to `untrusted`, emits relay/downgrade warnings, and adds resolver/run-attempt tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: put `features.hooks=false` in the app-server CODEX_HOME that `auth-bridge.ts` injects, leave process HOME/CODEX_HOME different, and the new resolver will inspect the wrong file before spawning Codex.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor changes and real patched-branch proof; the current blocker is a command-execution policy/security issue rather than a safe automated repair lane.
